ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "used_by" TEXT /* Indicates which graph type or layout algorithm the setting is used by */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the configuration setting (e.g., double, string, escString) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration setting */,
  "minimum_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the configuration setting */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the configuration setting */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration setting is required */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration setting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the configuration setting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_types" (
  "graph_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph type */,
  "graph_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the graph type (e.g., directed, undirected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the graph type */,
  "is_directed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the graph type is directed or undirected */,
  "default_layout_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Default layout algorithm for this graph type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_algorithms" (
  "layout_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout algorithm */,
  "layout_algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the layout algorithm (e.g., neato, sfdp, fdp) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layout algorithm */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the layout algorithm is the default for any graph type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the layout algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the layout algorithm was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_values" (
  "config_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration value */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the configuration value is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration value was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_values_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, designer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the change was a rollback */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the configuration setting before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme of the theme */,
  "font_scheme" TEXT /* Font scheme of the theme */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the theme is shared with other users */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the theme */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the theme was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_themes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theme_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., color, font, shape) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the attribute is custom */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the attribute was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_attributes_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES graph_themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graphs" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph */,
  "graph_name" TEXT /* Name of the graph */,
  "graph_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph type */,
  "layout_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layout algorithm */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting used */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the graph is public or private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the graph */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the graph was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the graph was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the graph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphs_layout_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_algorithm_id") REFERENCES layout_algorithms ("layout_algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphs_graph_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_type_id") REFERENCES graph_types ("graph_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., entity, attribute) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the node is public or private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the node */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the node was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the node was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_nodes_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_nodes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_nodes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of the edge (e.g., directed, undirected) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the edge is public or private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the edge */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the edge was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the edge was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the edge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_edges_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES graph_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_edges_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_edges_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES graph_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_edges_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_edges_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_type" TEXT /* Type of the label (e.g., node, edge) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the label is public or private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the label */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the label was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the label was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_labels_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_labels_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_labels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the change was a rollback */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the graph element before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)
